description:
A screenshot of a user interface for the "Add Ingestion" process, specifically depicting "Step 2 'Dataset Selection Upload Dataset - Vector'". The previous step, "1 Input Type Selection", is greyed out.

The interface presents instructions for "Parameter for the Class Code", stating that "Values of the selected attribute column must only contain upper- and lower-case letters, numbers, underscores or hyphens."
An "Excluded Value" field is shown, with an explanation that these values, representing non-thematic data, will be counted as "NoData" during ingestion, and that NoData values specified in a TIF dataset's metadata are automatically excluded.
A "Layer Name" field contains the pre-filled value "AT005L3_INNSBRUCK_UA2018" and an instruction to "Enter Layer Name from Dataset which shall be used to generate Input Classes."
A large dashed-line area indicates a "Drag and Drop" option for files, or users can click an "UPLOAD DOCUMENT/S" button with an arrow-up icon.
Below the upload area, a note explains that "All documents that help to understand the content, including legend files which will be used to automatically create Input Classes and metadata files which will be used to automatically prefill the data description. (No file type restrictions)" are to be uploaded.
A checkbox labelled "Delete raw data" is present, accompanied by a question mark icon for help.
At the bottom of the interface, three action buttons are displayed: "CANCEL", "BACK", and "ADD".
